creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Commit https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/ports-mgmt/pkg/pkg-plist?id=3e8236085199a7aa24fe60fadf8a9777612b54d2 added etc/periodic/security/405.pkg-base-audit. This file is also provided by security/base-audit.

Here's a sample from Synth building my local metaport first pulling in ports-mgmt/pkg and later security/base-audit.

===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/base-audit-0.5.pkg
Installing base-audit-0.5...
pkg-static: base-audit-0.5 conflicts with pkg-1.18.1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/etc/periodic/security/405.pkg-base-audit

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/base-audit-0.5.pkg
